prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约5527→5983→4080→9455→4030，整体波动较大。2024年因新高考选科要求调整出现异常高位9455，2025年迅速回落至4030 ，为近年最低水平。近两年基准位次约4030名；该校在黑龙江省物理类（含理科）招生计划：2021年67人，2022年70人，2023年64人，2024年67人，2025年72人 ，2026年70人。2026年较2025年缩招2人，缩招幅度约2.8%，竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京交通大学是211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第 41名，属于国内顶尖211行列，工科实力突出；2026年高考周期内学校声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及实验室安全事件，可能轻微影响部分考生报考意愿；抖音热度 排名第45位，评价为较热，关注度中等。未见明显投档断档记录；系统科学A+（全国第一）、交通运输工程A、信息与通信工程A、计算机科学与技术A-、土木工 程A-、管理科学与工程A-。计算机类、电子信息类、交通运输类等招生专业对应优势学科，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程 等专业在2026年高考周期内均为高热推荐/推荐状态，与北交大优势学科高度契合，推高相关专业报考热度。黑龙江省2026年普通高考考生总数约16.7万人，较2025年（约16.5万 人）小幅增加约1.1%，竞争略有加剧。；北京交通大学位于北京市，对黑龙江省考生具有较强地域吸引力。该校在黑龙江省物理类 招生规模约70人左右，属中等规模，招生稳定性较好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动趋势、2026年小幅缩招（-2.8%）、考生总数略增（+1.1%）、声誉偏负面及优势专业热 度高等因素，在2025年基准4030名基础上，预计2026年最低位次约3993名，区间3493-4493名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 5527 → 5983 → 4080 → 9455 → 4030, showing significant fluctuations overall. In 2024, due to adjustments in subject selection requirements for the new Gaokao, an abnormally high ranking of 9455 occurred, which quickly dropped back to 4030 in 2025, the lowest level in recent years. The baseline ranking for the past two years is approximately 4030. The enrollment plan for this university in Heilongjiang Province for Physics Category (including Science) was: 67 in 2021, 70 in 2022, 64 in 2023, 67 in 2024, 72 in 2025, and 70 in 2026. Compared to 2025, the enrollment in 2026 is reduced by 2 students, a reduction of about 2.8%, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Jiaotong University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking 41st in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings. It belongs to the top tier of 211 universities, with outstanding engineering strength. During the 2026 Gaokao cycle, the university's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving laboratory safety incidents, which may mildly affect some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranks 45th, evaluated as relatively hot, with moderate attention. No obvious records of admission cut-off drops were observed. Disciplines: Systems Science A+ (first in the country), Transportation Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-. Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Transportation Engineering correspond to advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are all in a highly recommended/recommended status during the 2026 Gaokao cycle, highly aligned with BJTU's advantageous disciplines, boosting the application enthusiasm for related majors. The total number of regular Gaokao candidates in Heilongjiang Province in 2026 is approximately 167,000, a slight increase of about 1.1% compared to 2025 (about 165,000), slightly intensifying competition. Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to candidates from Heilongjiang Province. The enrollment scale for Physics Category in this province is about 70 students, a medium scale with good enrollment stability.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trend, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (-2.8%), the slight increase in total candidates (+1.1%), the slightly negative reputation, and the high popularity of advantageous majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 4030, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 3993, with a range of 3493-4493.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3493-4493, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information Category, Automation Category, Transportation Engineering Category) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Zhan Tianyou Pilot Class, Computer Science Category) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Science Experimental Class) as a safe backup. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 3493), one can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
